case_title: SAMUEL J SHERRY VS. VICENTE SANDOVAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY SHERRY, SAMUEL J AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, VICENTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT SHEPPARD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHERRY, SAMUEL J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, VICENTE $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $465.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
